title: Automaton Transfusion
overview: Three teens find themselves in a town over run with zombies. Deciding to fight back, they go on a punch you in the throat, action packed, non stop ride through the city, woods, and schools.

trailers.title: Automaton Transfusion Trailer (TADFF 2007)
trailers.channel_name: Toronto After Dark: Horror, Thriller, Sci-Fi Fest
